title: Restrict Managed Column Editing from Template Center

posts.author: NickVanHolsbeeck (Nick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I’m a user on an Enterprise Plan and we are frequently using Managed Columns, which are very helpful for editing/updating content and having them sync automatically to Boards that they’re used in.

However now I noticed someone added a value to a Managed Column I created. I do not see any option for restricting the EDITING (as in e.g. adding new values) of this Managed Column from within the Managed Column Template Center.

Restrict editing of the Column in the Boards is no option as I still want to allow users to switch between e.g. the Status’es from this Column.

Request:
Add the ability to restrict editing permissions of Managed Columns from within the Managed Column Template Center

What are you trying to achieve

Ability to restrict editing permissions of Managed Columns from within the Managed Column Template Center
